forbidden_sources: diagnostics export as runtime health truth
regions.implementation_note: May show support boundaries and source labels; must not imply live health success from export alone.

forbidden_sources: account or backend runtime truth not supplied by canonical command packets
regions.implementation_note: Represents the support package or selected diagnostic signal, not engine-level runtime ownership.

allowed_sources: diagnostics export status for support-artifact status
separately labeled status/healthcheck packets for runtime summary
forbidden_sources: support-artifact status presented as runtime health
cached snapshot overriding live packet truth
regions.implementation_note: Visual status must label whether it is support-artifact metadata or runtime packet summary.

allowed_sources: diagnostics export strict JSON command packet
regions.implementation_note: The current chain may show command-boundary steps; real probe-chain details are deferred until command packets expose them.

regions.required_future_surface: bounded redacted diagnostics-history JSON command packet
regions.implementation_note: Implementation may reserve the slot and show fixture-only charting; live chart remains deferred.

forbidden_sources: diagnostics export result as runtime summary
regions.implementation_note: Must be visually and textually separate from diagnostics export output.

regions.required_future_surface: bounded redacted latest-diagnostics-records JSON command packet
regions.implementation_note: May exist as a fixture-only layout region; live rows are not admitted.
Recommendations are navigation/action affordances only, not hidden execution.

allowed: render fixture-only chart/latest-record regions in fixture mode
render deferred live states for history/latest-record regions
optionally render separately labeled runtime summary from existing readonly command packets

resume_from_here: Run independent audit, closeout, final scans, commit, and push.
